## Does this need a spec?

<!-- CLAUDE.md §Rules: non-trivial features go through spec-driven-workflow first, at
docs/specs/<feature>-v1.md. Delete this section only for small, well-bounded tweaks. -->

- [ ] This is small enough to skip the spec step — here's why: …

## Out of scope
